Patch Set 4: (1 inline comment)

Sorry for my late comment.  This has been sitting in "Draft" for a few weeks since I wrote it.  I guess I forgot to hit Review after making the comment.

Patch Set 8: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

-1 Until the question of the target naming format change is resolved.

Patch Set 4: (1 inline comment)

I really hope you carefully consider your -1 inspection. The file name doesn't cause any other big issue. But if this patch landed, we can test and update fc18 and upstream kernel more efficient.

Patch Set 8: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Brian,
I'm not wholly against the use of "redhat-fc18" instead of tracking the specific "3.6-fc18" or "3.7-fc18" or whatever the latest kernel is.  The other alternative is to use "3.x-fc18" or similar so that it doesn't have to be bumped for every kernel version.

The difference with older 2.6-fc15 and such is that the "2.6" part was constant for all of the releases and the ".18" or ".32" part was incremented, but excluded from our naming convention.
Uploaded patch set 9.

Patch Set 9:

Build Started http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/13816/
Patch Set 9: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/13816/ : SUCCESS

Rosso Autotest has started the test process

Patch Set 9:

Rosso Autotest has started the test process

Patch Set 9: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

(1 inline comment)
Patch Set 9: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve
Patch Set 9: (1 inline comment)

Patch Set 9:

Brian, your arguments echo what I was thinking previously, but my desire to get this patch landed and starting to test FC18 outweighed my desire to get it right.

I also didn't notice that the target.in file has to be edited to update the kernel version, so there isn't really a benefit to keeping the same filename between e.g. a 3.7->3.8 kernel transition.

I still want to get this patch landed and FC18 testing sooner rather than later.  I'm OK with landing this now, and having a follow-on patch to rename the file, but if a new patch can be submitted ASAP with the 3.6-fc18 name I'd approve of that as well.

Patch Set 9: Verified

Autotest results available at https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/8aaa4b8a-8775-11e2-9069-52540035b04c

Patch Set 9: Looks good to me, approved

(3 inline comments)
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 7ec56e2628a908343c9c60396e63f8e7093821b5.

commit.subject: LU-2148 kernel: Kernel update for latest FC18 kernel
commit.message:
LU-2148 kernel: Kernel update for latest FC18 kernel

Add fc18 support for build system

Signed-off-by: yang sheng <ys@whamcloud.com>
